zh.lifeSummary: John Hartshorn是John Hartshom的兒子，於1582年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什。他於1609年2月23日與Ann Bignell在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1658年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布藍普頓 艾什。

nameMeanings.name: Hartshorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hartshorne (Derbyshire), from Old English heort ‘hart, stag’ (genitive heortes) + horn ‘horn’, perhaps in reference to the nearby hill (known as Hart Hill) and its supposed resemblance to a hart's horn. Alternatively, the name may be topographic, from Middle English harteshorn ‘swine cress’, for someone who lived at or near an area where swine cress grew.

variants.name: Hartshorne
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): variant of   Hartshorn  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Hartshorn was born in 1582, in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England as the son of John Hartshom. He married Ann Bignell on 23 February 1609, in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1658, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Hartshorn est né en 1582, à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fils de John Hartshom. Il a épousé Ann Bignell le 23 février 1609, à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1658, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hartshornは1582年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュでJohn Hartshomの息子として生まれた。1609年2月23日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュでAnn Bignellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1658年に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブランプトン アッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hartshorn(은)는 1582년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에서 John Hartshom의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1609년 2월 23일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에서 Ann Bignell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1658년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Hartshorn родился в 1582 г. в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его отца звали John Hartshom. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Bignell 23 февраля 1609 г. в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1658 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности брамптон аш, нортамптоншир, Англия.
